name: ruc-mcp
description: Run the RUC MCP server from its published Docker image.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to the RUC MCP server.
interface.longDescription: RUC MCP wraps the ghcr.io/mightydatainc/ruc-mcp:latest Docker image so Codex can launch the MCP server through Docker.
defaultPrompt: Use RUC MCP to help with this task.
List the available RUC MCP tools.
Inspect this with the RUC MCP server.
